summary: GH-102 spec is approved for a minimal Core consumption fixture contract. The spec keeps scope limited to a Lode-side repo-local fixture and discoverability metadata for package admission and schema validation. It explicitly excludes Core/Harbor/App code, Core result envelope schema, runtime/live evidence, hosted registry, and write behavior.
